---
title: "Camille Giuliano"
name: "Camille Giuliano"
image: https://github.com/camillegiuliano/photos/blob/main/pfp.jpg
comments: false
about:
  id: camille
  template: solana
  image: https://github.com/camillegiuliano/photos/blob/main/pfp.jpg
  image-shape: rounded
links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/camillegiuliano
    - icon: envelope
      text: e-mail
      href: "mailto: camille.giuliano@nrcan-rncan.gc.ca"
---

::: {#camille}
Camille works as a forest research analyst at the Pacific Forestry
Centre.
:::
